transcription.text: We're gonna be low up up, yeah, I'll tell ya Close your eyes, 1, 2, 3 D.O. D.O. D.O. D.O. D.O. So come up with me, I'll take you high That prima donna spice up your life You know I got that shit that you like So come up with me, run up, uh, jump, D.O. Watch me running up the place I'm already starting and my girls are on the way D.O. Watch me upping up the place Wanna see you bumping, baby, bouncing to the bass Are you not entertained?
